name: io.github.juanklagos/sdd-mcp
description: Spec-Driven Development workflow server: specs, plans, gates, consent, status and logbook tools. Bilingual EN/ES. No code before approved spec and consistent plan.

environmentVariables.name: SDD_PROJECT_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to the SDD workspace (project with specs/ or a spec/ sidecar). Defaults to the current working directory.
